title: Kekoy Extendable Grabber Reacher Tool with Headlight, 32 inch Foldable Lawn Trash Picker Upper Grabber, 90° Rotating Anti-Slip Jaw, Heavy-Duty Stick, Portable Claw Grabber for Elderly(Orange）
features: 【Upgraded Grabber Tool with Light & Magnet】Kekoy reachers grabbers and pick up tools headlight is convenient to help find objects accurately in dark environments, and easily grabs anything that falls on cracks, under the bed, under the sofa. (including battery), Just pull out the insulating sheet and you can use the headlight.

【32 Inch Extension Arm Picker Upper Grabber】The extended handle design of the helping hand grabber allows you to pick up items from the floor, top shelf, outdoor lawn, trash can.Such as picks up coins, envelops, trash, broken glass etc.

【Magnetic Tip & Large Diameter Jaw】The magnet design of the grab head can help you easily grab keys, spoons, and other light metal objects.Maximum claw opening up to105mm for easily grip a wide range of objects.An ideal gift for pregnant women, elderly, and allows users to maintain independent living.

【Anti-slip Grab Head & Ergonomic Trigger Handle】The grab head adopt thickened anti-skid texture soft rubber, this design ensures that the water bottle will not slip off when being grabbed. The handle trigger also uses a non-slip texture pattern, which can increase friction and reduce the force of your hand.

【Light Weight Material & Portable】This extendable grabber was made of heavy-duty aluminum alloy material and adopted a folding type design, not only perfect for kitchens, bedrooms but also suitable for picking up garbage, pet feces, leaves, etc. Besides, the open hook can be hung anywhere, saving space and keeping the room tidy.
description: Product Description Grabber Reacher Tools for Wide Application You can place one in upstairs, one in downstairs, one in kitchen, one in bedroom, one in garden. These pick up grabbers will make you easier in these places. Bright Headlight & Long-term Endurance Each battery has 120 hours lifespan. Remember to turn off the switch, these three batteries can maintain a very long light life. It is quite convenient for you to find objects accurately in dark environment. Magnetic Tip Pickup Tool Powerful Magnetic Tips Magnetic hook can attract tiny objects like fork, spoon, coins or keys, you are able to use the magnet to lift it safely. Large Rotatable Jaws 90° rotatable gripper A gripper that can rotate 90 degrees, allowing it to vertically and horizontally grip objects on high places or on the ground. Ergonomic comfort handle Comfortable Grip Rubber handles provide a more comfortable grip, the angle of the handle is suitable for the whole family members. Foldable and Easy to Carry Folding Design The foldable tool allows for convenient portability while on-the-go, can be easily stowed away to save space when not in use at home Indoor Use Gifts for mom & dad & pregnant women & mothers : Not having to reach down and pick up item where out of your arm's reach. This helps parents relieve their back. Help elderly life easy : Picking up the smallest of items off the floor to getting cans from the pantry, make life easier for the elderly. Outdoor Use A good tool for picking up garbage : The foldable design is convenient to carry around. You can use it to pick up animal poop without dirty your hands.
